title: arctostaphylos rubra
intro: Arctostaphylos rubra, also known as the red bearberry or kinnikinnick, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to North America, belonging to the heath family (Ericaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of arbutin and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Arctostaphylos rubra include its potential to support urinary tract health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Arctostaphylos rubra can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support urinary health and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections.
